business_ideas.idea: Short Pop Mart stock starting end of 2026 through 2027 as collectible craze peaks

predictions.text: Labubu will peak at $2-3B revenue then crash as collectible crazes historically peak at 2-3 years
Pop Mart not sustainable beyond 5 years; will follow pattern of Beanie Babies and Pokemon cards
Celebrity endorsements and lipstick effect (economic pressure driving small luxury purchases) fueling Labubu
